---
title: '#Excercise07'
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-27"
---
#Solution 7.1
#We generate 3000 data points from a bivariate Guassian distribution.

```{r}
library(mvtnorm)
require(mvtnorm)

mu <- c(0, 0)
sigma <- matrix(c(9,0,0,9), ncol =2, byrow = T)
x <-rmvnorm(n=3000, mean =mu, sigma = sigma)

summary(x)
```
#Comment- Write by yourself

#Solution 7.2

```{r}
plot(x[,1], x[,2], main ="Scatter Plot", asp=2)
```
